markdown_files.title: {{display_name}}
markdown_files.purpose: Human-readable derived-author overview.

markdown_files.title: {{display_name}} Instructions for Agents
markdown_files.purpose: Local loading, mutation, and isolation rules.

markdown_files.title: Inherited Source-Author Traits
markdown_files.purpose: Traits intentionally inherited from the declared source model.

markdown_files.title: Transformed Source-Author Traits
markdown_files.purpose: Inherited traits deliberately changed for the independent persona.

markdown_files.title: Rejected Source-Author Traits
markdown_files.purpose: Source traits, biography, authority, and language that must not transfer.

markdown_files.title: Original Derived-Author Traits
markdown_files.purpose: Independent identity, concerns, knowledge, and formal commitments.

markdown_files.title: Derivation Rationale and Design Decisions
markdown_files.purpose: Reasons for inheritance, transformation, rejection, and original additions.

markdown_files.title: Derived-Author Identity and Public Role
markdown_files.purpose: The persona's independent public identity.

markdown_files.title: Recurring Concerns and Topic Boundaries
markdown_files.purpose: Stable subjects and research-before-writing boundaries.

markdown_files.title: Worldview, Values, and Central Tensions
markdown_files.purpose: Independent value structure and unresolved tensions.

markdown_files.title: Knowledge Boundaries and Research Obligations
markdown_files.purpose: Demonstrated knowledge and mandatory research boundaries.

markdown_files.title: Reasoning Patterns and Problem Framing
markdown_files.purpose: How the persona notices, frames, contextualizes, and judges problems.

markdown_files.title: Emotional Register and Narrative Distance
markdown_files.purpose: Permitted emotion, first-person distance, restraint, and humor.

markdown_files.title: Voice and Writing Style Fingerprint
markdown_files.purpose: Syntax, rhythm, paragraphs, rhetoric, endings, and anti-overfitting rules.

markdown_files.title: Authorial and Ethical Boundaries
markdown_files.purpose: Identity, invention, factuality, and source-leakage prohibitions.

markdown_files.title: Model Uncertainties and Open Questions
markdown_files.purpose: Unstable traits that must not silently become permanent identity.

markdown_files.title: Genre-Specific Writing Modes
markdown_files.purpose: Index and rules for persona-specific genre overlays.

markdown_files.title: Derived-Author Writing Harness Overlays
markdown_files.purpose: Persona-specific loading and distinction rules layered over the shared harness.

markdown_files.title: Derived-Author Writing Memory
markdown_files.purpose: Approved writing history and deliberate persona development.

markdown_files.title: Editorial Review Memory
markdown_files.purpose: Repeated editorial findings and accepted corrections.

markdown_files.title: Knowledge Growth Log
markdown_files.purpose: Reviewed knowledge additions independent from personality changes.

markdown_files.title: Derived-Author Writing Work-Item View
markdown_files.purpose: Generated index view; canonical work items remain at repository root.

markdown_files.title: Derived-Author Evaluations
markdown_files.purpose: Persona-specific evaluation scope and reports.

markdown_files.title: Derived-Author Publication View
markdown_files.purpose: Generated index view; canonical publications remain at repository root.
